title: tragopogon bornmuelleri var. bornmuelleri
intro: Tragopogon bornmuelleri var. bornmuelleri, also known as the Lesser Salsify or Creeping Salsify, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is a member of the Tragopogon genus, which includes various species of salsify. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, with its roots and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. Tragopogon bornmuelleri var. bornmuelleri can be prepared as a tea or tincture to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations, making it a valuable herbal remedy.
